title: The First Cholesterol Pill That Actually Works Like an Injection
description: After decades of incremental improvements, enlicitide delivers the biggest cholesterol drop since statins—in pill form. But the real question isn't whether it works. It's whether lowering cholesterol this aggressively actually saves lives—and why we still don't know.
heroImageAlt: Editorial illustration for The First Cholesterol Pill That Actually Works Like an Injection
